profile.tagline: Mods, tools & datamining for the games we play.

links.title: Forever Winter Almanac
links.blurb: Offline, installable PWA — interactive maps, weapon & attachment gunsmith, datamined game systems and the raiding-loot economy.

links.title: FWACT — Config Tool
links.blurb: Total graphical control over the game's config (INI, GVAS .sav, advanced cvars) with in-game labels, tooltips, auto-backups and presets. Portable Tauri app.

links.title: GR: Breakpoint Modding KB
links.blurb: Human- and AI-readable knowledgebase for modding Ghost Recon: Breakpoint — Anvil .forge format, ATK, and the asset-replacement pipeline.

links.title: Forever Winter Skin Mods
links.blurb: Retarget scav skin mods onto DLC skin slots (UE5 IoStore repath + export rename). Tooling + docs.

links.title: Unkillables Rebalance Fix
links.blurb: Compatibility fix for the Unkillables Rebalance mod (Nexus #68) — de-invincibles the bosses on the current build.

links.title: Heavy Rifle Rebalance Fix
links.blurb: Compatibility fix for the Heavy Rifle Rebalance mod (Nexus #76) — rebuilds the pak for build 0.9.3.9.2.

links.title: Bandits: Homestead
links.blurb: Bandits Week One add-on (B42): claim a house as home to stop NPCs moving in, plus forge door/vehicle keys.

links.title: Bandits: Extended Scenario
links.blurb: Extended sandbox options for Bandits Week One (B42): exact start day, collapse pacing, emergency-service duration, sickness cap.

links.title: Bandits: Extra Chat
links.blurb: Standalone add-on for Bandits Week One (B42): extra NPC chat, smarter responses, new give/grab/go actions.

links.title: Bandits: Performance Override
links.blurb: Research + un-junking plan for Bandits: Week One FPS on B42.

links.title: Map Teleport
links.blurb: B42 mod: right-click the in-game world map for a “Teleport Here” option during normal play.

links.title: Hotbar Icon Guard
links.blurb: Tiny B42 patch: null-checks hotbar icon textures so one broken icon no longer floods the console or tanks FPS.

links.title: Player Model Reload Util
links.blurb: B42 utility: rebuild your character's 3D model on demand to recover from the invisible-character bug without reloading.

links.title: Common Sense Fixing Fix
links.blurb: Compatibility patch for Common Sense (B42): rewrites Fix Plunger / Fix Nightstick fixings to stop a vehicle-menu crash.

links.title: Slayetta Faces Fix
links.blurb: Compatibility shim fixing Slayetta Faces (and legacy FM_Data face packs) on Build 42.

links.title: Boards for Charcoal
links.blurb: Build charcoal pits from stacked planks (boards) instead of firewood.

links.title: /fixtl
links.blurb: Server mod: /fixtl clears a stuck teleporting flag that breaks translocators after repeated game-mode swaps.

links.title: Purposeful Storage Patches
links.blurb: Content mod: adds weapons from several mods to Purposeful Storage's racks, spear racks and pedestals.

links.title: /resyncmodels
links.blurb: Server mod: force-rebroadcasts players' entity data — workaround for remote-player invisibility.

links.title: HIT Console Patch
links.blurb: Harmony patch silencing leftover debug console spam in Harper's Immersive Tools v2.4.3.

links.title: Torches Contribute Heat
links.blurb: Lit torches act as minor heat sources, warming nearby players and rooms.

links.title: Revenge QuickFormat
links.blurb: A Revenge (Discord) plugin mimicking QuickCSS-style style overrides from other clients.

links.title: Chime Data Grabber
links.blurb: One-click Tampermonkey userscript exporting Chime transactions to clean CSV/JSON. Read-only, no credentials.

links.title: Sylvibot (staging)
links.blurb: Staging area for a bot-tagged editing account on the Forever Winter Wiki — drafts, versions and editor tooling.
